title: Temporary closure of Conville Swimming Pool
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - According to George Municipality the Conville Swimming Pool will be closed to the public on Saturday, 24 January, due to the hosting of the Eden Aquatics Gala.

The facility will reopen to the public as per normal operating hours thereafter.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
